statements.impact_statement: squish serves models via MLX safetensors only. llama-cpp-python GGUF heap overflow CVE-2024-34359 has no attack surface.
squish uses safetensors exclusively. PyTorch pickle-based .pt/.bin deserialization is neither loaded nor executed in the squish inference path.
squish does not use Keras or model.json format. Keras RCE CVE-2024-3660 code path is not reachable.
squish does not call torch.load(). All model loading uses safetensors which validates headers cryptographically and never deserializes Python pickle objects.
CVE-2025-32434 is a PyTorch torch.load() RCE even with weights_only=True. squish never invokes torch.load(); MLX is used exclusively for all weight loading.
squish does not use HuggingFace Transformers at inference time and never executes trust_remote_code paths. Model files are static weight tensors only.
squish does not depend on LangChain. The PAL chain code injection in CVE-2023-36188 has no attack surface; no user-supplied input is passed to exec() or eval() in squish.
squish does not render Jinja2 templates from user-supplied content. Jinja2 is a transitive documentation dependency only; it is not invoked in the inference server path.
Jinja2 sandbox bypass CVE-2024-56326 requires attacker-controlled template input. squish has no such code path in the inference server or CLI.
Related to CVE-2024-56326: squish does not execute Jinja2 templates from external or user-controlled data at runtime.
squish does not extract ZIP archives containing model weights at runtime. The zipp infinite-loop DoS CVE-2024-5569 is not triggerable in squish.
squish uses stdlib urllib for VEX feed fetches. Transitive certifi pins via doc/test tooling are under review. A CA bundle version audit is scheduled for the next maintenance cycle.
squish uses Python stdlib urllib for all HTTP operations. The requests TLS verification bypass CVE-2024-35195 has no attack surface; squish does not import requests at runtime.
squish uses stdlib urllib, not urllib3. The proxy-authorization header leakage CVE-2024-37891 has no attack surface.

squish does not call setuptools at runtime. CVE-2024-6345 RCE via malicious package metadata requires setuptools to process an attacker-controlled package; squish's inference server does not install packages.
squish serves MLX safetensors format; ONNX Runtime is not installed. The integer overflow in ONNX model parsing CVE-2024-21506 has no attack surface.
squish server uses uvicorn with starlette, not aiohttp. HTTP request smuggling CVE-2024-52304 has no attack surface.
squish processes model configuration and SBOM data as JSON. libexpat XML parsing is not used in any squish code path. CVE-2024-45490 entity expansion DoS is not reachable.
The OpenSSL use-after-free CVE-2024-4741 affects async X.509 APIs. squish uses the Python ssl module's standard TLS stack and does not invoke the affected OpenSSL async code path.

XZ Utils backdoor CVE-2024-3094 targets xz-linked sshd on affected glibc Linux distributions. squish ships as Python wheels without xz-linked binaries. Model weights use safetensors or MLX-native formats.
squish does not use Git submodules for model artifact retrieval. Git RCE via malicious submodule URL CVE-2024-32002 has no attack surface.
squish does not use MLflow. Arbitrary file read via crafted MLflow artifact URI CVE-2023-6831 has no attack surface; mlflow is not a squish dependency.
squish inference endpoints accept JSON bodies only; multipart/form-data is not handled. Starlette large multipart DoS CVE-2024-24762 is not triggerable.
squish does not use Vite or serve a browser frontend. Vite open redirect CVE-2024-45811 has no attack surface.

squish does not pass externally-controlled data to Jinja2. Jinja2 sandbox bypass via attr filter CVE-2025-27516 requires attacker-controlled template source; squish never renders external templates at runtime.
